ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Invalidating Trust Restatement, Removal And Replacement Of Trustee, Financial Elder Abuse, Return Of Trust Assetts, Imposition Of Constructive Trust, Prohibiting Trustee From Using Trust Funds, Damags, Surcharge, And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Continued To Jun-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Kithas appeared via zoom for Byron Norris (petitioner).
Sarah Cullen appeared via zoom for Joey Jones.

Mr. Kithas stated that he recently took over from prior counsel, that he has spoken with the trustee, and that he is working with the Historical Society. He also stated that no disbursements would be altered, and that If they can't reach an agreement then they will go back to mediation.

Ms. Cullen stated that the settlement agreement didn't change, and that the only beneficiaries entitled are the ones that need to be properly served.

The matter are continued to June 10, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing An Ex Parte Petition To Set The Amount Of Bond For The Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-02-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Emily Blake for and with Byron Norris (petitioner) (via zoom).
John DiPiazza, Successor Trustee (via zoom).

Discussion was held regarding bonfd amount set at $3,500,000.00, that parties are to submit a and for the correct bond amount, and that they have settled this case.

The matter is ordered off calendar.

The Status on Filing Bond is set for September 30, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Estate matter of Robert D. Dockendorff set for December 1, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. is being advanced to October 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Invalidating Trust Restatement, Removal And Replacement Of Trustee, Financial Elder Abuse, Return Of Trust Assetts, Imposition Of Constructive Trust, Prohibiting Trustee From Using Trust Funds, Damags, Surcharge, And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Continued To Sep-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Emily Blake, Esq., for Byron Norris, Petitioner.
Michael Hackard, Esq., Sarah Culler, Esq., and Dave Jones, Esq., for Joey Jones, Respondent.

At the outset, counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the subject matters. There is discussion regarding the signatures on the stipulation before the court, and of a bond. Counsel advises the court that the parties intend to mediate.

After additional discussion, the application for approval of stipulation is taken under submission. The Petition for Invalidating Trust Restatement, etc., is continued to Sep-30-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Peou. Not Reported.
